channel.title: Python on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Python on jamesm.blog

item.title: Mac Homebrew packages
item.description: Comprehensive list of essential Homebrew packages for macOS development, DevOps, cloud tools, and command-line utilities.

item.title: Data Engineering & Data Science Courses
item.description:
How to Use This Guide

This curated list covers courses from beginner to advanced levels across multiple platforms. Choose based on:

  • Your role: Data Engineer, Data Analyst, or Data Scientist
  • Learning style: Self-paced courses, specializations, or nanodegrees
  • Timeline: Single courses (weeks) vs. comprehensive programs (months)
  • Hands-on practice: Most include projects and real-world scenarios
  • Cloud platform: AWS, GCP, Azure, or multi-cloud approaches

Data Engineering

Professional Certificates (Industry-Backed)

Best for: Structured learning with recognized credentials

item.title: List of DevOps Courses
item.description: Comprehensive collection of DevOps courses covering AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Linux, and cloud infrastructure training.

item.title: DevOps Books
item.description: Recommended reading list of DevOps and infrastructure engineering books covering cloud, containers, infrastructure as code, and programming languages.
